section.heading: Model emergency response policies, procedures, and practices
section.chapeau: The Secretary, in consultation with the Attorney General and the Secretary of Homeland Security, shall continue to—

paragraph.content: advise institutions of higher education on model emergency response policies, procedures, and practices; and
disseminate information concerning those policies, procedures, and practices.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–329, title VIII, § 822, as added Pub. L. 110–315, title VIII, § 801, Aug. 14, 2008, 122 Stat. 3410.)
